sections.content: Let me check where the dot moved to now. It was at (35, 16) and I clicked it again. Let me see the new position.

</function>

sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
The magenta dot moved from (35, 16) to (34, 15) - again up-left by 1. So clicking a magenta dot moves it diagonally up-left by 1 cell each time. The dot at (1, 5) is the one in the top bar, not a gameplay dot.
So the 4 gameplay magenta dots are at: (34, 15), (36, 40), (55, 46), (56, 15).
The blue circle is around (27, 33). 
I need to figure out where these dots need to go. Maybe they need to reach the blue circle? But they move up-left, and some dots are already to the left of the circle.
Wait - maybe each dot moves in a different direction depending on its position relative to the circle? Let me check by clicking a dot that's to the right of the circle, like (36, 40).

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Try clicking a dot on the right side to see its movement direction
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 36, 'col': 40}])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
